description: Equations used by plan-lib.js and interpreted by the model.
wingLoading: WL = W / S_dm2; W is derived from selected target WL, then checked against motor capability.
thrustMargin: estimatedStaticThrust / allUpWeight must meet the selected motor minimumThrustToWeightRatio for the intended style.
noveltyDistance: Weighted normalized distance across validated geometry; category penalties apply for different style/control layouts.
